---
title: "Projects"
description: "Research projects by Your Name"    # CHANGE
toc: false
listing:
  contents: listing-grid  # CHANGE: rename to match your folder name (e.g. projects)
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, description, categories, image]
  image-height: auto
page-layout: full
---
